LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.descript: Weld a layer of reinforced steel plating to the vehicle, increasing its armor value at the cost of increasing vehicle mass and lowering acceleration.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.label: Reinforced Armor
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.descript: Replace the tires with deep treaded tires that provide more traction and will allow the vehicle to move significantly faster offroad.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.label: Off Road Tires
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.descrip: Increase the size of the chemtank slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.label: Fuel Capacity
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.descript: Mount thick steel chains around tires, preventing them from slipping on icy surfaces and greatly improving winter travel speed. The additional grip slightly increases acceleration.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.label: Chained Tires
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.descript: Install a spoiler to boost the maximum speed of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.label: Spoiler
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.descript: Install an autonomous miniturret at the front of the vehicle. Requires steel to refurbish
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.label: Mini Turret
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.descript: Improve the cargo capacity of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.label: Cargo Capacity
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.descript: Reinforce the armor of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.label: Armor
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.descript: Improve the engine of the vehicle, allowing it to reach higher maximum speed.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.label: Speed
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.descript: Improve shifting capabilities of transmission to increase acceleration speed of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.label: Acceleration
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.descript: Improve the exhaust system of the vehicle, improving fuel efficiency slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Prowler_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.label: Fuel Consumption
